title: Disable local (key-based) auth on the Azure OpenAI account [AI.102]

title: Use Microsoft Entra Auth with Managed Identity instead of API keys [AI.62]

title: Restrict access to selected virtual networks or use private endpoints [AI.103]

title: Diagnostic logs enabled on Azure AI service resources [AI.86]

title: Content-Safety baseline content filter attached to approved models [AI.52]

title: Jailbreak / prompt-injection risk detection on the agent prompt [AI.93]

title: Use RBAC to manage data-plane access to Azure OpenAI [AI.66]
